tagline: Turn chaos into your next best action.

designSystem.style: Dark glassmorphism with deep purple/violet primary palette, teal secondary, and amber accents. Card-based layout with subtle gradient borders, pill labels, and layered surfaces on near-black background. Micro-interactions with scale press effects.

screens: Today — Context-aware home screen showing transition detection banner, next best action card with contextual chips and dependency alerts, and a prioritized task list
Flow Plan — Time-boxed re-entry mode selector (5/15/30 min) with interactive step-by-step recovery path, tap-to-complete steps, and a begin flow CTA
Capture — Voice recording interface with animated mic button, quick text input, source filter tabs, and a scrollable list of captures with one-tap convert action
Insights — Weekly interruption bar chart, key stats (interruptions count, avg recovery time), top derailers with progress bars, circular adaptation score, and usage streak
